lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਵਸੰਦੜੋ ਸਚੁ ਸਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਭੇ ਡੁਖੜੇ ਉਲਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: man vasandarro sach sahu naanak habhe ddukharre ulaeh |2|
lines.english: When the True Lord and Master abides in one's mind, O Nanak, all sins are dispelled. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਅਘਾ ਸਭਿ ਨਾਸ ਹੋਹਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kott aghaa sabh naas hohi simarat har naau |
lines.english: Millions of sins are totally erased, by meditating on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਭੈ ਕਟੀਅਹਿ ਨਿਹਚਲ ਸਚੁ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran bhai katteeeh nihachal sach thaau |
lines.english: The fear of birth and death is eradicated, and one's eternal, unchanging true home is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਚਿੰਦੇ ਫਲ ਪਾਈਅਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man chinde fal paaeeeh har ke gun gaau |
lines.english: The fruits of one's heart's desires are obtained, by singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh raakh lehu naanak bal jaau |5|
lines.english: Bless me with Your mercy, God - please preserve and save me! Nanak is a sacrifice to You. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਸਮਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: poorab hovai likhiaa har charan samaau |
lines.english: If it is so pre-ordained, one is absorbed in the Lord's lotus feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਰਚਨਾ ਅਪਾਰੰ ਮਨਿ ਬਿਲਾਸ ਸੁਆਦੰ ਰਸਹ ॥
lines.translit: grih rachanaa apaaran man bilaas suaadan rasah |
lines.english: They are involved in their beautiful houses, and the pleasures of the mind's desires.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਦਾਂਚ ਨਹ ਸਿਮਰੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਜੰਤ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਮਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kadaanch neh simarant naanak te jant bisattaa krimah |1|
lines.english: They never remember the Lord in meditation; O Nanak, they are like maggots in manure. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਾਂਈ ਜੈਂ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਤਨੁ ਖੇਹ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: so saanee jain visarai naanak so tan kheh |2|
lines.english: That body which forgets the Lord, O Nanak, shall be reduced to ashes. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਚੁ ਅਡੰਬਰੁ ਹਭੁ ਕਿਹੁ ਮੰਝਿ ਮੁਹਬਤਿ ਨੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: much addanbar habh kihu manjh muhabat neh |
lines.english: They are engrossed in ostentatious displays, lovingly attached to all their possessions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਇਛੇ ਸੁਖ ਮਾਣਦਾ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹਿ ਵਿਸੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: man ichhe sukh maanadaa kichh naeh visoore |
lines.english: He may relish in the pleasures of his mind's desires, and have no anxiety at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁੰਦਰ ਸੇਜ ਅਨੇਕ ਸੁਖ ਰਸ ਭੋਗਣ ਪੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: sundar sej anek sukh ras bhogan poore |
lines.english: He may enjoy a beautiful bed, countless pleasures and all sorts of enjoyments.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਸੋਇਨ ਚੰਦਨ ਸੁਗੰਧ ਲਾਇ ਮੋਤੀ ਹੀਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: grih soein chandan sugandh laae motee heere |
lines.english: He may possess mansions of gold, studded with pearls and rubies, plastered with fragrant sandalwood oil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਵਿਸਟਾ ਕੇ ਕੀਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: so prabh chit na aavee visattaa ke keere |
lines.english: But if he does not remember God, he is like a maggot in manure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਨ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਕਿਤੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਮਨੁ ਧੀਰੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: bin har naam na saant hoe kit bidh man dheere |6|
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, there is no peace at all. How can the mind be comforted? ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਬਿਰਹੰ ਖੋਜੰਤ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਹ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal birahan khojant bairaagee deh disah |
lines.english: One who loves the Lord's lotus feet searches for Him in the ten directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਆਗੰਤ ਕਪਟ ਰੂਪ ਮਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਨੰਦ ਰੂਪ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਮਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tiaagant kapatt roop maaeaa naanak aanand roop saadh sangamah |1|
lines.english: He renounces the deceptive illusion of Maya, and joins the blissful form of the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਸਾਂਈ ਮੁਖਿ ਉਚਰਾ ਵਤਾ ਹਭੇ ਲੋਅ ॥
lines.translit: man saanee mukh ucharaa vataa habhe loa |
lines.english: The Lord is in my mind, and with my mouth I chant His Name; I seek Him in all the lands of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਭਿ ਅਡੰਬਰ ਕੂੜਿਆ ਸੁਣਿ ਜੀਵਾ ਸਚੀ ਸੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak habh addanbar koorriaa sun jeevaa sachee soe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, all ostentatious displays are false; hearing the Praises of the True Lord, I live. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸਤਾ ਤੂਟੀ ਝੁੰਪੜੀ ਚੀਰ ਸਭਿ ਛਿੰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: basataa toottee jhunparree cheer sabh chhinaa |
lines.english: He dwells in a broken-down shack, in tattered clothes,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਨ ਇਠ ਧਨ ਰੂਪਹੀਣ ਕਿਛੁ ਸਾਕੁ ਨ ਸਿੰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: mitr na itth dhan roopaheen kichh saak na sinaa |
lines.english: with no friend or lover, without wealth, beauty, relatives or relations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜਾ ਸਗਲੀ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਕਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਨੁ ਭਿੰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: raajaa sagalee srisatt kaa har naam man bhinaa |
lines.english: Even so, he is the king of the whole world, if his mind is imbued with the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਤਿ ਨ ਪਤਿ ਨ ਆਦਰੋ ਉਦਿਆਨ ਭ੍ਰਮਿੰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaat na pat na aadaro udiaan bhraminaa |
lines.english: with no social status, no honor and no respect; he wanders in the wilderness,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਧੂੜਿ ਮਨੁ ਉਧਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਹੋਇ ਸੁਪ੍ਰਸੰਨਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: tis kee dhoorr man udharai prabh hoe suprasanaa |7|
lines.english: With the dust of his feet, men are redeemed, because God is very pleased with him. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਲੀਲਾ ਰਾਜ ਰਸ ਰੂਪੰ ਛਤ੍ਰ ਚਮਰ ਤਖਤ ਆਸਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: anik leelaa raaj ras roopan chhatr chamar takhat aasanan |
lines.english: The various sorts of pleasures, powers, joys, beauty, canopies, cooling fans and thrones to sit on

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਚੰਤਿ ਮੂੜ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਧਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਪਨ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਮਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: rachant moorr agiaan andhah naanak supan manorath maaeaa |1|
lines.english: - the foolish, ignorant and blind are engrossed in these things. O Nanak, desire for Maya is just a dream. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਹੂਣੀਆ ਸੁੰਦਰਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਧ੍ਰੋਹੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vihooneea sundar maaeaa dhrohu |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the beauty of Maya's illusion is fake. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਪਨੈ ਹਭਿ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਣਿਆ ਮਿਠਾ ਲਗੜਾ ਮੋਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: supanai habh rang maaniaa mitthaa lagarraa mohu |
lines.english: In a dream, he enjoys all sorts of pleasures, and emotional attachment seems so sweet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਪਨੇ ਸੇਤੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਮੂਰਖਿ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: supane setee chit moorakh laaeaa |
lines.english: The fool attaches his consciousness to the dream.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਰੇ ਰਾਜ ਰਸ ਭੋਗ ਜਾਗਤ ਭਖਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bisare raaj ras bhog jaagat bhakhalaaeaa |
lines.english: When he awakes, he forgets the power, pleasures and enjoyments, and he is sad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਰਜਾ ਗਈ ਵਿਹਾਇ ਧੰਧੈ ਧਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aarajaa gee vihaae dhandhai dhaaeaa |
lines.english: He passes his life chasing after worldly affairs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਭਏ ਨ ਕਾਮ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: pooran bhe na kaam mohiaa maaeaa |
lines.english: His works are not completed, because he is enticed by Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਵੇਚਾਰਾ ਜੰਤੁ ਜਾ ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: kiaa vechaaraa jant jaa aap bhulaaeaa |8|
lines.english: What can the poor helpless creature do? The Lord Himself has deluded him. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੰਤਿ ਸ੍ਵਰਗ ਲੋਕਹ ਜਿਤਤੇ ਪ੍ਰਿਥਵੀ ਨਵ ਖੰਡਣਹ ॥
lines.translit: basant svarag lokah jitate prithavee nav khanddanah |
lines.english: They may live in heavenly realms, and conquer the nine regions of the world,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਰੰਤ ਹਰਿ ਗੋਪਾਲਹ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਉਦਿਆਨ ਭਰਮਣਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bisarant har gopaalah naanak te praanee udiaan bharamanah |1|
lines.english: but if they forget the Lord of the world, O Nanak, they are just wanderers in the wilderness. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੋੜੀ ਨਰਕ ਬਰਾਬਰੇ ਉਜੜੁ ਸੋਈ ਥਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak korree narak baraabare ujarr soee thaau |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, their home is like a wilderness, in the depths of hell. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਤਕ ਕੋਡ ਤਮਾਸਿਆ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵਸੁ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kautak kodd tamaasiaa chit na aavas naau |
lines.english: In the midst of millions of games and entertainments, the Lord's Name does not come to their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਭਇਆਨ ਉਦਿਆਨ ਨਗਰ ਕਰਿ ਮਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa bheaan udiaan nagar kar maaniaa |
lines.english: He sees the terrible, awful wilderness as a city.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠ ਸਮਗ੍ਰੀ ਪੇਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jhootth samagree pekh sach kar jaaniaa |
lines.english: Gazing upon the false objects, he believes them to be real.
